notes: Grundbog chapters are treated primarily as conceptual framing texts in this course.
Lecture slides should shape sequence and emphasis more than standalone theory claims.
Seminar and exercise slides should count mainly as application and clarification evidence.

policy.description: Course-specific interpretation policy for the Personlighedspsykologi Source Intelligence Layer.
